point = Point(2, 3)
line = Line(Point(0, 0), Point(8, 6))

matrix = Matrix([[1, -1], [-1, 1]]) 
reflected_point = point.x, point.y - 2 * matrix[0][0] * point.x - 2 * matrix[0][1] * point.y

print(f'{reflected_point[1]} {reflected_point[0] - reflected_point[1]}')"}}
